custom_nodes.author: denyazzolin
custom_nodes.title: comfyui-daz-tools
custom_nodes.description: A collection of ComfyUI utility nodes. The Workflow Config nodes (WAN2.2 and LTX2.3) let you store multiple named presets — models, LoRA stacks, prompts, dimensions, and sampling parameters — and switch between them from a single dropdown, making it easy to test variations, manage scene setups, and iterate across versions without rebuilding your workflow or creating and maintaining multiple copies of it. Additional nodes: Lora Inspector (scans and displays safetensors metadata for any LoRA in your library), Check Null (detects null, None, NaN, or empty values), Null Audio Checker (detects silent/missing audio tracks from video inputs), and Abs Int (absolute value for integers).

custom_nodes.author: ShankHub-Org

custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI-Base64-Nodes
custom_nodes.description: Nodes to convert data such as images and audio from Base64 format into comprehensible format for use with other ComfyUI nodes.

custom_nodes.author: redstonewhite
custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI-OneShotOutputs
custom_nodes.description: A minimal ComfyUI extension that lets you mark any node to discard its output from cache immediately after all downstream nodes have consumed it.

custom_nodes.author: Alvidi
custom_nodes.title: timeline_viewer_AV_comfyUI
custom_nodes.description: A custom ComfyUI node that provides an interactive video player with timeline scrubbing and audio waveform display.

custom_nodes.author: Anzhc
custom_nodes.title: Euler_A2_Sampler-ComfyUI
custom_nodes.description: ComfyUI custom sampler node implementing Euler A2 sampling algorithm. (Description by CC)

custom_nodes.author: zhoul1
custom_nodes.title: resize_fill_background
custom_nodes.description: A ComfyUI custom node that scales images proportionally and fills to specified dimensions with a solid color background, supporting size reduction and centered placement. (Description by CC)

custom_nodes.author: 222222222l
custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI-Falcon-Perception
custom_nodes.description: An elegant, robust, and highly-optimized ComfyUI custom node package for the tiiuae/Falcon-Perception vision-language model for open-vocabulary grounding and instance segmentation.

custom_nodes.author: cyanideoverdose
custom_nodes.title: JStudio_Wildcards
custom_nodes.description: A wildcard prompt node for ComfyUI with Jinja2 templating, YAML wildcard support, negative prompt resolution, and hot-reload — no server restart needed when you update your wildcard files.

custom_nodes.author: bemoregt
custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI_StripesConv
custom_nodes.description: A ComfyUI custom node that blends a natural image with a stripe pattern image using pixel-wise multiplication, producing a geometric composite output.

custom_nodes.author: allegiancerecords0-afk
custom_nodes.title: Comfyui-LatentOR
custom_nodes.description: Latent detection logic node
